name: Polenta Toscana (Tuscan Polenta)
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the olive oil over medium-low heat in a small, heavy saute pan.
2. Add the rosemary and walnuts to the pan.
3. Cook for 5 minutes without letting either ingredient brown.
4. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the walnut mixture.
5. Stir the seasoned walnut mixture into the cooking polenta about 10 minutes before it is fully cooked.
6. Continue stirring and cooking until the polenta is ready to serve. Serve immediately or cool down to make crostini.
